entities.name: GEOSPATIAL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used for crop inventory, area estimation, and data generation for agricultural holdings.

entities.name: CROP INVENTORY
entities.description: The process of documenting and measuring the area and extent of crops.

entities.name: AREA ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of estimating the area of crops within a growing season.

entities.name: MIXED CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown together in the same area.

entities.name: SEASONALLY VARYING CROPS
entities.description: Crops whose extent changes based on the season.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL HOLDINGS
entities.description: Land or property used for agricultural purposes.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Data gathered regarding agricultural production and land use.

entities.name: RURAL YOUTHS
entities.description: Young people in rural areas who can adapt and use geospatial technology.
